---
title: "Shataxi Dubey"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shataxi-dubey
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/shataxidubey

---

Hi, I am Shataxi Dubey — an AI/ML Engineer at SmartSense Consulting Solutions, passionate about building intelligent systems that can hear, see, and understand the world through voice agents, vision-language models, and large language models..
I have experience developing enterprise-grade voice agents and RAG-based systems, and I’m continually deepening my understanding of how NLP can be leveraged to design smarter, more capable systems in today’s AI-driven engineering landscape.
My interest lies in Machine Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, and Vision-Language Models (VLMs). During my Master’s thesis, I explored how VLMs can be applied to satellite imagery — a challenging and high-impact domain. Prior to that, I worked with models such as Faster R-CNN and YOLO to detect brick kilns in satellite images, contributing to efforts aimed at addressing a significant source of air pollution.
## Education

M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering |
Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar | Gandhinagar, Gujarat |
 July 2023 - June 2025

B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering |
University of Allahabad | Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh |
 July 2018 - May 2022


## Experience

AI/ML Engineer I | SmartSense Consulting Solutions | August 2025 - Present

Associate Engineer | 
Indiamart Intermesh Ltd | May 2022 - July 2023
